about.paragraph1: Have you thought about maybe joining the 1st of May parade and wondering when it starts?
about.paragraph2: But when you search on the internet you find either no references or just old programs for previous years?
about.paragraph3: With this website you never have to doubt anymore and can always find the current year's program directly.

kommune.missing: Unfortunately, information for this municipality is missing.

main.title: Find the 1st of May program for your area

updates.email_line1: Subject: 1st of May program link for Minby
updates.paragraph1a: You can send email with updates to
updates.paragraph1c: as well as a very short description/text for the link.
updates.paragraph2: To filter out spam, make sure to include the word "skomakermelk" somewhere in the text, all emails that do not do this will be automatically deleted.
updates.paragraph3: NB, do not send in links to Facebook or X (previous Twitter). They will under absolutely no circumstances be used!
updates.paragraph4a: If you send in multiple links at once, you can best use
updates.paragraph4b: either as text in the email or as an attached file (remember to still include "skomakermelk" in the email text).
